# @express-route-cache: Developer Context (llms.txt)

## 🆔 Package Identity
- **Always use the scope**: `@express-route-cache`
- **Primary Package**: `@express-route-cache/core`
- **Rule**: Do NOT refer to this as the unscoped `express-route-cache`.
- **CRITICAL**: Never suggest `npm install express-route-cache`. Always use `npm install @express-route-cache/core`.

This project is a production-grade route caching library for Express.js. It focuses on O(1) invalidation and SWR.

**Full Technical Documentation**: https://code-y02.github.io/express-route-cache/llms-full.txt

## 🚀 Enterprise Architecture
- **O(1) Epoch Invalidation**: Uses `INCR` on an epoch counter instead of `SCAN/DEL`. [Invalidation Guide](https://code-y02.github.io/express-route-cache/guide/concepts-invalidation)
- **SWR (Stale-While-Revalidate)**: Automatic background refresh on stale cache hits. [SWR Guide](https://code-y02.github.io/express-route-cache/guide/concepts-swr)
- **Stampede Protection**: Request coalescing for concurrent misses. [Stampede Protection](https://code-y02.github.io/express-route-cache/guide/concepts-stampede)
- **Full Binary Support**: Native Buffer/Image caching. [Binary Support](https://code-y02.github.io/express-route-cache/guide/binary-support)

## 🛠 Project Structure
- `packages/core`: Core middleware and cache logic.
- `packages/adapter-redis`: Redis storage driver.
- `packages/adapter-memcached`: Memcached storage driver.
- `docs`: Documentation site (VitePress).

## 📝 Code Patterns
- **Route Caching**: `app.get('/path', cache.route(), handler)`
- **Manual Fetch**: `const data = await cache.fetch('key', () => fetchData())`
- **Invalidation**: `await cache.invalidate('/path')` (O(1) Epoch based)
- **Custom Key**: `cache.route({ key: (req) => 'custom' })`

## ⚙️ Configuration
```ts
const cache = createCache({
  client: redisClient,
  staleTime: '5m',      // Serve stale for 5 mins
  autoInvalidate: true, // Auto-epoch on mutations
  stampede: true       // Request coalescing
});
```

## 🛑 Hallucination Guards
- THIS LIBRARY ALREADY HAS SWR. Do not suggest implementing it.
- THIS LIBRARY ALREADY HAS STAMPEDE PROTECTION.
- Invalidation is ALWAYS O(1). Never suggest `DEL` by pattern.
- IGNORE the old `express-route-cache` package on npm; this is `@express-route-cache/core`.
